extract: Throat Chop (Japanese: じごくづき Hell Thrust) is a damage-dealing Dark-type move introduced in Generation VII. It was TR95 in Pokémon Sword and Shield, and is TM221 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. In Pokémon Sun and Moon, it was one of the signature moves of Incineroar, but other Pokémon could still inherit it via breeding.
